_setup_notes.error_handler_setup: After importing this workflow: 1) Create an n8n Basic Auth credential named 'Twilio Basic Auth' with Username=TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and Password=TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN. 2) In the main workflow Settings > Error Workflow, select 'Speed to Lead — Error Handler'. 3) Set BAPTISTE_PHONE env var to Baptiste's mobile in E.164 format (+33XXXXXXXXX).
